layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto md:max-w-2xl lg:max-w-4xl px-4 min-h-screen

buttons.primary: bg-[#F3BA2F] text-black hover:bg-[#D4A017] font-bold rounded-xl shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(243,186,47,0.4)] transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#27272A] hover:border-[#F3BA2F] text-white rounded-xl transition-all
buttons.quiz_option: h-24 md:h-32 text-xl font-bold rounded-xl shadow-lg border-b-4 border-black/20 active:border-b-0 active:translate-y-1 transition-all flex items-center justify-center p-4 text-center break-words

cards.base: bg-[#121212] border border-[#27272A] rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-xl
cards.highlight: bg-[#121212] border border-[#F3BA2F]/50 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(243,186,47,0.1)] rounded-2xl p-6

inputs.default: bg-[#0A0A0A] border border-[#27272A] focus:border-[#F3BA2F] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#F3BA2F] rounded-lg h-12 px-4 text-white placeholder:text-gray-600 transition-all

visual_enhancers.texture: bg-[url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1762279388956-1c098163a2a8?crop=entropy&cs=srgb&fm=jpg&ixid=M3w3NTY2NzR8MHwxfHNlYXJjaHw0fHxuZW9uJTIwZnV0dXJpc3RpYyUyMGJsb2NrY2hhaW4lMjBuZXR3b3JrJTIwZGFyayUyMGJhY2tncm91bmR8ZW58MHx8fHwxNzczMjc0NTc3fDA&ixlib=rb-4.1.0&q=85')] bg-cover bg-center bg-no-repeat bg-fixed opacity-20 mix-blend-overlay fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none z-0

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL @twa-dev/sdk immediately. This is a Telegram Mini App.
Force DARK MODE in tailwind config. Do not allow light mode toggle.
Use 'Space Grotesk' for all Headings (h1-h3) and 'Inter' for body text.
Use the specific 'quiz_option' button style for the Game Screen. Do NOT use standard Shadcn buttons for answers.
Implement a 'Lobby' screen with a massive, pulsing Join Code.
Use Framer Motion for the countdown timer (circular progress) and answer reveal animations.
For the 'Binance Academy' search results, use a 'Glitch' or 'Terminal' text effect to make it feel techy.
Ensure all touch targets are at least 44px high (Mobile First).
Use 'sonner' for all in-game notifications (e.g., 'Correct!', 'Wrong Answer').
universal_guidelines: Avoid gradients on text, it reduces readability on mobile.
Do not use generic 'Card' components for everything. Use 'Border-only' containers for a cleaner look.
Animations must be snappy (0.2s - 0.3s). No slow fades.
